de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.njml

Class JmlParserBaseListener

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.njml.JmlParserBaseListener
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    JmlParserListener, org.antlr.v4.runtime.tree.ParseTreeListener

    public class JmlParserBaseListener
extends java.lang.Object
implements JmlParserListener
    This class provides an empty implementation of JmlParserListener, which can be extended to create a listener which only needs to handle a subset of the available methods.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      JmlParserBaseListener()
